title: useReducer
description: Scale up state with actions and reducers.

options: Multiple pieces of state change together or complex transitions
questions.explanation: One clear reducer beats many tangled useStates.
The reducer returns a new state object with n: 1.

options: Pure — no side effects, returns new state

questions.explanation: Third arg is a function called with initialArg to build initial state.

options: Small Redux setups for co-located state
questions.explanation: For medium apps this is often plenty — no Redux required.
